access_token.description: RD Station Marketing OAuth access token, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <access_token>). Never logged.

base_url.description: RD Station Marketing platform API base URL override for tests or proxies.

contact_identifier.description: Identifier kind for contact detail/funnel streams.

contact_identifier_value.description: Identifier value for contact detail/funnel streams.

contact_uuid.description: Contact UUID for contact event streams.

segmentation_id.description: Segmentation ID for the segmentation_contacts stream.

catalog_feed_id.description: Product catalog feed ID for the catalog_feed detail stream.
